summary: Deterministic Level A patch-authority scope for the dossier-core local provider and authority boundary.
notes: This is the current Level A hard gate.
Python top-level function/class/import additions or modifications must be accounted for in patch-ledger.json symbols[].
Allowed glob patterns are matched conservatively from the repository root and do not imply nested subtree or suffix-path authorization unless the pattern explicitly says so.
Forbidden trailing slash-star patterns such as packages/* and apps/* quarantine descendants.
Level B PatchPlanIR is a future target and is not wired into execution yet.
